detectors.description:
Low level call in LiquidityPool.withdrawNativeGasFee() (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityPool.sol#383-392):
	- (success,None) = address(_msgSender()).call{value: _gasFeeAccumulated}() (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityPool.sol#388)

Low level call in LiquidityProviders.addNativeLiquidity() (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityProviders.sol#250-254):
	- (success,None) = address(liquidityPool).call{value: msg.value}() (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityProviders.sol#251)

Low level call in HyphenLiquidityFarming._sendRewardsForNft(uint256,address) (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityFarming.sol#122-165):
	- (success,None) = _to.call{value: balance}() (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityFarming.sol#140)
	- (success_scope_0,None) = _to.call{value: pending}() (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityFarming.sol#145)

Low level call in LiquidityProviders.increaseNativeLiquidity(uint256) (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityProviders.sol#332-339):
	- (success,None) = address(liquidityPool).call{value: msg.value}() (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityProviders.sol#336)

Low level call in LiquidityPool.sendFundsToUser(address,uint256,address,bytes,uint256,uint256) (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityPool.sol#263-297):
	- (success,None) = receiver.call{value: amountToTransfer}() (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityPool.sol#289)

Low level call in LiquidityProvidersTest.addLpFeeTesting(address,uint256) (contracts/test/LiquidityProvidersTest.sol#10-20):
	- (success,None) = address(liquidityPool).call{value: msg.value}() (contracts/test/LiquidityProvidersTest.sol#15)
Parameter ERC20Token.mint(address,uint256)._amount (contracts/test/ERC20Token.sol#14) is not in mixedCase
Parameter ERC20Token.mint(address,uint256)._to (contracts/test/ERC20Token.sol#14) is not in mixedCase
Parameter LPToken.exists(uint256)._tokenId (contracts/hyphen/token/LPToken.sol#98) is not in mixedCase
Parameter LPToken.mint(address)._to (contracts/hyphen/token/LPToken.sol#83) is not in mixedCase
Function ILiquidityProviders.BASE_DIVISOR() (contracts/hyphen/interfaces/ILiquidityProviders.sol#5) is not in mixedCase
Function Pausable.__Pausable_init(address) (contracts/security/Pausable.sol#26-30) is not in mixedCase

LiquidityPool.getRewardAmount(uint256,address) (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityPool.sol#175-188) uses literals with too many digits:
	- rewardAmount = (amount * incentivePool[tokenAddress] * 10000000000) / liquidityDifference (contracts/hyphen/LiquidityPool.sol#184)
